info.name: Icon Perfumes API
info.description: Complete API collection for Icon Perfumes Backend (Django REST Framework). Base URL: {{base_url}}/api/

item.name: Auth & Accounts
item.description: User authentication, registration, OTP verification, password management

request.description: Register a new user. Sends OTP to email for verification. Returns masked_email and email.
Login with phone_number (or email) and password. Optionally sync cart_data and wishlist_data from localStorage. Sets 'token' cookie on success.
Verify user email with OTP received after signup. Activates user account and sets token cookie.
Resend OTP to user's email. Max 5 OTPs per day.
Send a password reset link to the user's email.

variable.description: Reset password token received via email

request.description: Reset password using the token sent to email via forgot-password endpoint.
Change password for authenticated user. Requires old_password and new_password.
Logout current user. Deletes 'token' cookie.

item.name: User Profile
item.description: User profile CRUD and OTP verification for profile updates

request.description: Get authenticated user's profile (phone_number, email, username, name).
Update user profile. If email or phone_number changes, an OTP is sent for verification.
Delete authenticated user's account permanently.
Verify OTP sent during profile update (when email/phone changed). On success, profile is updated.
Get current authenticated user info (id, username, email, phone_number, is_staff, is_superuser).
Get user details by ID. Requires authentication.
Get all users. Requires staff/admin authentication.

item.name: Addresses
item.description: User address management (max 5 addresses per user)

request.description: Get all addresses for the authenticated user along with user info.
Get a single address by address_id query parameter.
Add a new address. Max 5 addresses per user. Requires address, city, state, pincode.
Update an existing address by address_id. All fields are optional (partial update).
Delete an address by address_id. Only the owner can delete their address.

item.name: Products
item.description: Product listing, detail, categories, and banners

query.description: Search query (searches in title, description, keywords)
Sort: price_low_to_high, price_high_to_low, name_a_to_z, name_z_to_a, date_old_to_new, date_new_to_old
Enable pagination (true/false). If false, returns all products.

request.description: Get all product variants with pagination, search, filters, sorting, and category filtering. No auth required.
Get single product details by slug. Returns variants, reviews, and related products based on shared notes.
Get product categories. Returns all categories when no params, or filters by parent/sub-category. Supports product slug validation.
Get all active banners (hero sections). Returns section, image, mobile_image, is_active.
Get all items in the authenticated user's cart.
Add a product variant to cart. Pass variant ID in URL. Optional quantity query param.
Remove a product variant from the cart.
Increase quantity of a product variant in cart. Limited by stock availability.
Decrease quantity of a product variant in cart. If quantity becomes 0, asks for removal confirmation.
Get all wishlist items for the authenticated user.

variable.description: ProductVariant ID to add to wishlist

request.description: Add a product variant to the wishlist. Uses get_or_create to prevent duplicates.

variable.description: ProductVariant ID to remove from wishlist

request.description: Remove a product variant from the wishlist.
Get reviews for a product by slug. Paginated. Returns average rating, rating distribution (1-5), and reviews. No auth required.
Post a review for a product. Max 3 reviews per user per product. Rating: 1-5, comment is optional.

item.name: Checkout & Payments
item.description: Checkout total calculation, order creation, and payment verification

request.description: Calculate checkout total. Source: 'cart' (array of items) or 'buynow' (single item). Supports promo_code, shipping calculation by pincode. Free shipping for orders >= ₹499.
Calculate checkout total for single product buy-now flow. Source should be 'buynow' with cart_data containing item and quantity.
Create an order and initiate PayU payment. For cart source: creates order from user's cart items. Returns PayU payment URL and params.
Create an order for buy-now flow and initiate PayU payment. Pass product item ID and quantity.
Verify PayU payment after redirect. Pass txnid (transaction ID). Updates order payment_status to 'Paid' and generates invoice.
Get all orders for the authenticated user. Returns order details with items.
Get detailed order info with order items. Only the order owner can view.
Delete/cancel an order by ID. Only the order owner can cancel.
Generate and retrieve invoice PDF for an order by order_number.

query.description: Order ID to mark as seen

request.description: Mark an order as 'seen' (sets is_new=False). Used by admin.
Check if an order is new (is_new=True/False). Returns 'true' or 'false' string.
Get all available promotions/promo codes. Returns coupon_code, promotion_type, discount_type, discount_value, tag_line, start_date, end_date, is_active.
Subscribe to newsletter with email. Sends a welcome email on success.
Unsubscribe from newsletter by email.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "phone": "9876543210",
    "subject": "Product Inquiry",
    "message": "I would like to know more about your attar collection."
}

request.description: Submit a contact us form. Sends confirmation email to user and notification to admin.
